home.title: My Work

hero.title: Crafting Web Interfaces with Native Precision.
hero.subtitle: Hi, I'm Arian. A Frontend Engineer crafted around performance, seamless animations, and clean architecture. I turn complex logic into fluid, premium web experiences.

home.ndaNotice: To respect non-disclosure agreements (NDA), some production-level enterprise applications and corporate systems are omitted from this public showcase.

projects.title: Selected Works
projects.subtitle: A collection of premium web applications and interactive products crafted with performance, accessibility, and high-end aesthetics in mind.

about.title: Info & Journey
about.description: About me, my professional experience, and technical skills.
about.bio: I am Arian, 21 years old, a software engineering student. With several years of experience in solving challenges, I help you elevate your digital business to the next level and create a powerful online experience.

kanda.desc: Working as a Frontend Developer, designing and implementing modern web interfaces. Collaborating with technical teams to deliver scalable features, optimize user experience, and maintain robust component-based architectures using modern frontend patterns.

isiran.desc: Motamayez Group operates in the field of large-scale national initiatives such as the Ministry of Education. I was active as a Frontend Developer, contributing to several key enterprise projects and platforms within this group.

mosbatesabz.desc: During my 6-month internship at Mosbatesabz, I took my first steps into the world of programming. I explored both frontend and backend development, mastered the core technologies of web development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript), and built a solid professional foundation in frontend engineering.

educationItem.desc: Software engineering associate student at STVC, focusing on core computer science foundations, algorithm design, and software engineering methodologies.

cat1.title: Frontend Core
cat1.quote: "Building bridges between frontend magic and clean, maintainable logic."

cat2.title: Modern Frameworks
cat2.quote: "Perfection is achieved not when there is nothing to add, but when there is nothing to take away."

cat3.title: UI & Styling
cat3.quote: "Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works."

cat4.title: Backend & DB
cat4.quote: "From database queries to server logic, every layer of the architecture matters."

cat5.title: API & Networking
cat5.quote: "Creating reliable channels for data to flow seamlessly across distributed systems."

cat6.title: Workflow & Team
cat6.quote: "Great software is not built by individuals, but by aligned minds playing in harmony."

placeholders.interest1Desc: Creating interfaces that react beautifully to user behavior.
placeholders.interest2Desc: Experimenting with mathematics and physics-based animations.
placeholders.goalsText: My future roadmap focuses on mastering creative development, exploring WebGL/Three.js, advanced performance optimization, and systems architecture.

footer.ctaSubtitle: Looking for a frontend engineer to bring your ideas to life? Let's connect and talk about your project.
